channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from multiple sources

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire with Hezbollah withdrawal
item.description: Israel and Lebanon agreed to implement a ceasefire requiring complete cessation of fire by Hezbollah and creation of pilot zones where Lebanese armed forces take exclusive control, following US-led talks in Washington.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇰🇼 Iran strikes Kuwait airport, flipping escalation script on US Navy blockade
item.description: By striking Kuwait main airport, the IRGC attempted to flip the escalation script after US aircraft fired Hellfire missiles to disable commercial oil tankers accused of trying to outrun the US Navy blockade.

item.title: 🇨🇳⚓ Chinese sailless submarine caught on satellite imagery at Shanghai shipyard
item.description: A new type of Chinese submarine that appears to lack a traditional sail has emerged at Jiangnan Shipyard in Shanghai, potentially representing a new class designed for high-speed underwater operations.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump privately told aides he would end Iran ceasefire if US troops killed
item.description: US President Donald Trump has told aides privately that he would consider ending the truce deal with Iran if it killed American troops, the Wall Street Journal reported citing US officials.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇸🇾 Israeli forces advance into southwestern Syria, shell areas near Daraa
item.description: Israeli forces shelled areas in southwestern Syria and advanced into the countryside of Daraa province, with three Israeli vehicles pushing into Wadi al-Raqad Road in the Yarmouk Basin area before withdrawing.

item.title: 🦠 DRC Ebola outbreak may have started as early as January, WHO says
item.description: The WHO chief warned that the virus "had a big head start" and that response efforts are being hindered by travel restrictions and community mistrust.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israeli Strikes Kill Nine in Lebanon as Hezbollah Fires Rockets
item.description: Israeli strikes killed nine people in Lebanon as Hezbollah fired rockets over the border, straining a partial ceasefire agreed between Israel and the Lebanese armed group.

item.title: 🇬🇧 MI5 Warns Chinese Spies Using Job Websites to Target UK Government Staff
item.description: British intelligence agency MI5 warned that Chinese spies are using fake job recruiters on job websites to identify and target government staff for potential recruitment.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Ukraine-Hungary Minority Rights Agreement Clears Path for EU Accession
item.description: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar announced an agreement with Ukraine over the rights of the Hungarian-speaking minority, removing a key obstacle to Ukraine's EU accession negotiations.

item.title: ⚖️ Haredi Protesters Storm Home of Israeli Supreme Court Judge Over IDF Draft
item.description: Ultra-Orthodox demonstrators breached the home of a senior Israeli judge amid protests against arrests of yeshiva students who refuse military service, highlighting deep social divisions in Israel.

item.title: 🕵️ US and Five Eyes Allies Warn of Chinese Espionage via LinkedIn Recruitment
item.description: The FBI, MI5 and other Western intelligence agencies issued a joint warning that Chinese spies are using professional networking sites like LinkedIn to recruit people with access to classified information.

item.title: 🏛️ Portugal and Austria Defeat Germany for UN Security Council Seats
item.description: Portugal and Austria won seats on the UN Security Council, defeating Germany in a vote. Kyrgyzstan also secured a seat for the first time, beating the Philippines 143-49.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House Approves War Powers Resolution to Halt Iran Military Action
item.description: The House voted 215-208 to rein in presidential war powers on Iran, with four Republicans joining Democrats. The vote represents a significant congressional rebuke to Trump over the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇧🇩🇺🇳 Bangladesh's Top Diplomat Elected UN General Assembly President
item.description: Khalilur Rahman won a tight race with 99 votes to become president of the 81st UNGA session, marking a significant diplomatic achievement for Bangladesh on the world stage.

item.title: 🛢️ Russian Oil Pipeline to Hungary and Slovakia Resumes After Months-Long Outage
item.description: Russian oil exports to Hungary and Slovakia via the Druzhba pipeline have returned to normal after a months-long outage that had fueled tensions between Ukraine and the Central European countries.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇱💬 Trump confirms calling Netanyahu "crazy" as Israel complicates Iran peace talks
item.description: President Trump acknowledged he called Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu "crazy" and accused Israel of complicating peace negotiations with Iran. The comments come amid ongoing ceasefire discussions following Iranian strikes.

item.title: 🇮🇳🔥 At least 21 killed in Delhi fire including foreign nationals
item.description: A deadly fire at a building in Delhi killed at least 21 people, including foreign nationals who had travelled to India for medical treatment. Many victims were South Asians accompanying relatives seeking healthcare.

item.title: 🇬🇧💀 Former MI6 chief Alex Younger dies at age 62
item.description: Alex Younger, who served as chief of the British Secret Intelligence Service (MI6) from 2014 to 2020, has died at the age of 62. Younger led the agency during a period of significant global challenges.

item.title: 🇺🇸✈️ US Marine Corps Retires Harrier Jump Jet After 50 Years
item.description: The USMC held a Sundown ceremony marking the end of Harrier operations. The iconic jump jet, a transatlantic success story, paved the way for the F-35B.

item.title: 🇨🇳🚢 Chinese Mystery Submarine With Unique Feature Spotted By Satellite
item.description: A new nuclear fast attack-sized submarine with an unusual design feature was caught on satellite imagery. Analysts suggest it could be China's answer to a high-speed interceptor boat.

item.title: 🇬🇷🇺🇦 Greece Protests to Ukraine Over Naval Drone in Its Waters
item.description: Greece filed formal diplomatic protests after an explosives-laden Ukrainian naval drone was discovered in Greek waters last month.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇪🇺🇺🇸 China, EU Slam Proposed US Tariffs, Reject Forced Labor Claims
item.description: Beijing and Brussels pushed back against Trump administration threats of up to 12.5% tariffs on imports from 60 economies over alleged forced labor concerns.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Attacks Kuwait and Bahrain, Straining Ceasefire
item.description: Iran launched missiles and drones at Kuwait and Bahrain just as Secretary of State Marco Rubio told lawmakers the Iran war was "concluded." One person was killed and 63 wounded at Kuwait airport.

item.title: 🇮🇹 Four Migrant Workers Burned Alive in Car Attack in Italy
item.description: Four migrant workers were reportedly burned alive in their car in an attack in Italy, highlighting ongoing violence against foreign workers in Europe.

item.title: 🇺🇦 NATO Chief Arrives in Kyiv After Massive Russian Strike Kills 20+
item.description: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte visited Kyiv one day after one of Russia heaviest attacks killed over 20 people and injured 100+ across Ukraine.
